case_title: JUAN PABLO MENDOZA ET AL VS. JAVAD N SANI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SANI, JAVAD N

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SANI, JAVAD N
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, JUAN PABLO RAHNER, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANI, JAVAD N GAETANI REAL ESTATE NAHVI, PARVIN $7,502.64 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,662.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MENDOZA, JUAN PABLO RAHNER, ELIZABETH SANI, JAVAD N NAHVI, PARVIN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,760.33 FILED BY MENDOZA, JUAN PABLO RAHNER, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT SANI, JAVAD N ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. JAVAD N SANI

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $85 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, JUAN PABLO RAHNER, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT SANI, JAVAD N
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUL-29-2024 ZOOM REQUEST AND ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(JAVAD N SANI(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JUAN PABLO MENDOZA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH RAHNER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM BUT IS NOT ALLOWED TO SPEAK DUE TO UNAUTHORIZED REMOTE APPEARANCE. DEFENDANTS JAVAD N SANI AND PARVIN NAHVI ARE PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAUGHTER SARA N. SANI. THE COURT DEEMS THE REPRESENTATION NOT APPROPRIATE. DEFENDANT PARVIN NAHVI DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
